idea-plugin.name: MarkdownNeat
idea-plugin.description:
MarkdownNeat is a lightweight, read-only viewer for JetBrains IDEs that renders GitHub Flavored Markdown and Mermaid diagrams offline with themes independent of the IDE.

  • GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM)
  • Mermaid 11.16.0 in fenced blocks and standalone .mmd and .mermaid files
  • Curated offline Material Design Icons and local diagram diagnostics
  • Light and Dark themes independent of the IDE theme
  • Automatic refresh when files change
  • Relative image and link support
  • Offline rendering with untrusted content sanitization

While enabled, MarkdownNeat opens .md, .markdown, .mmd, and .mermaid files in its read-only viewer instead of other file editors.

AI and IDE tools can continue to modify the underlying files, and MarkdownNeat refreshes the rendered view automatically.

See the roadmap for implemented and planned features.
